title: Hora, fechas y calendario
communication_goal: Usar hora, fechas y calendario en situaciones cotidianas.
cefr_objectives: Can use basic language related to hora, fechas y calendario.
explanation_es: Este tema desarrolla hora, fechas y calendario mediante práctica guiada y comunicación contextual.

lessons.title: What time is it?
lessons.objective: Preguntar y decir la hora en situaciones cotidianas usando expresiones básicas.

activities.feedback_correct: En punto se expresa con o'clock.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La hora no tiene minutos.

activities.feedback_correct: Half past indica treinta minutos después de la hora.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la expresión para :30.

activities.prompt: 9:15 = quarter ___ nine
activities.feedback_correct: Quarter past nine es 9:15.
activities.feedback_incorrect: A los quince minutos usamos past.

activities.instruction: Une la hora digital con su expresión.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes leer horas frecuentes en inglés.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Observa si los minutos son past o to la siguiente hora.

activities.prompt: time / what / is / it
activities.feedback_correct: Es la pregunta básica para saber la hora.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Empieza con What time y termina con it.

activities.prompt: The meeting starts at quarter past nine and ends at half past ten.
activities.question: What time does the meeting start?
activities.feedback_correct: Quarter past nine es 9:15.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Convierte quarter past nine en hora digital.

activities.prompt: It is seven o'clock. It is half past nine. It is quarter past two. It is quarter to five. It is five past ten.
activities.feedback_correct: Las horas se entienden con claridad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica past y to con una pausa mínima antes de la hora.

activities.prompt: The library opens at 8:30 and closes at 6:00. The English class starts at 10:15. The computer room closes at quarter to five.
activities.question: When does the English class start?
activities.feedback_correct: La clase empieza a quarter past ten.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la hora junto a English class starts.

activities.prompt: Write six activities and the time for each one. Use at least four different ways to say the time.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes comunicar horarios diarios de forma clara.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Revisa o'clock, half past, quarter past y quarter to.

activities.instruction: Coordina una cita con la IA.
activities.prompt: Ask the AI what time several activities happen and arrange a meeting at a convenient time.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes preguntar, entender y confirmar horas en inglés.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA muestra relojes visuales y ajusta la dificultad de las horas.

lessons.title: Days, months, and dates
lessons.objective: Decir y comprender días, meses y fechas básicas en situaciones cotidianas.

activities.prompt: What day comes after Monday?
activities.feedback_correct: Tuesday viene después de Monday.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Recuerda el orden de los días de la semana.

activities.prompt: The month after June is ___.
activities.feedback_correct: July viene después de June.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Piensa en el orden de los meses.

activities.prompt: March 12
activities.feedback_correct: Usamos el número ordinal para la fecha.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Las fechas necesitan un ordinal como twelfth.

activities.instruction: Une la expresión con su significado.
activities.feedback_correct: Reconoces expresiones básicas de calendario.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Relaciona cada expresión con su referencia temporal.

activities.prompt: your / when / birthday / is
activities.feedback_correct: Es la pregunta natural para preguntar por un cumpleaños.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Empieza con When is y coloca your antes de birthday.

activities.prompt: My birthday is on October twenty-third. This year, it is on a Monday.
activities.question: When is the birthday?
activities.feedback_correct: Twenty-third corresponde a 23rd.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha el ordinal después de October.

activities.prompt: Today is Monday. My birthday is on April fifteenth. The meeting is on September twenty-second.
activities.feedback_correct: Las fechas se entienden con claridad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica los ordinales y evita pronunciar el número cardinal directamente.

activities.prompt: The course starts on Tuesday, September 3rd. There is no class on Monday, September 9th. The final test is on Friday, September 27th.
activities.question: When is the final test?
activities.feedback_correct: La prueba final es el viernes 27.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la fecha junto a final test.

activities.prompt: Write six sentences about important dates: birthday, holidays, appointments, or study days. Include days and months.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes comunicar fechas personales y de calendario.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa on antes de una fecha y practica los ordinales.

activities.instruction: Organiza una cita con la IA.
activities.prompt: You need to schedule an appointment. Ask about available days and dates, propose one, and confirm it with the AI.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes coordinar una cita usando fechas reales.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA muestra un calendario y repite las fechas que necesitan práctica.

lessons.title: Plans and appointments
lessons.objective: Hablar de planes, eventos y disponibilidad usando fechas, horas y expresiones de calendario.

activities.prompt: You want to ask about availability.
activities.feedback_correct: Are you free...? pregunta si alguien tiene disponibilidad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa be + free y on con un día.

activities.prompt: What time is the appointment? It is ___ 2:30.
activities.feedback_correct: At se usa con una hora específica.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige la preposición para horas.

activities.prompt: The event is ___ Friday, May 10th.
activities.feedback_correct: On se usa con días y fechas.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La expresión incluye un día y una fecha.

activities.prompt: meet / can / we / on / Tuesday
activities.feedback_correct: Can we...? propone una actividad y on acompaña al día.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Empieza con Can we y coloca on Tuesday al final.

activities.instruction: Une la frase con la función.
activities.feedback_correct: Reconoces frases para organizar planes.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Identifica si la frase pregunta, propone, acepta o rechaza.

activities.prompt: I am busy on Monday, but I am free on Wednesday afternoon. Can we meet at three?
activities.question: When is the speaker free?
activities.feedback_correct: La persona dice I am free on Wednesday afternoon.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Escucha la frase después de but.

activities.prompt: Are you free on Thursday? Can we meet at four? That works for me. See you then.
activities.feedback_correct: Tu propuesta de cita suena natural y clara.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Sube la entonación en las preguntas y marca at four con claridad.

activities.prompt: Monday: busy all day. Tuesday: free after 5:00. Wednesday: English class at 6:00. Thursday: free in the morning. Friday: dentist appointment at 2:00.
activities.question: When is the person free in the morning?
activities.feedback_correct: El calendario dice free in the morning el jueves.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la palabra morning.

activities.prompt: Write a weekly schedule with five events, their dates or days, and times. Add two sentences about when you are free or busy.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes comunicar tu disponibilidad y compromisos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Usa at con horas y on con días o fechas.

activities.instruction: Organiza una reunión con la IA.
activities.prompt: Arrange a meeting with the AI. Discuss three possible days and times, explain one conflict, agree on a final appointment, and repeat the details.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes negociar y confirmar una cita con datos precisos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA muestra el calendario y repite la confirmación final para practicar comprensión.

lessons.title: Manage your calendar
lessons.objective: Integrar horas, fechas, disponibilidad y confirmaciones para gestionar compromisos reales.

activities.prompt: The appointment is ___ Monday at 10:00.
activities.feedback_correct: On acompaña al día; at acompaña a la hora.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La respuesta se refiere primero al día de la cita.

activities.prompt: So, we meet on June 14th at 3:30, right?
activities.feedback_correct: Confirmas que los detalles son correctos.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Elige una respuesta para confirmar una cita.

activities.prompt: I am busy ___ the morning, but free ___ Friday afternoon.
activities.feedback_correct: In se usa con partes del día y on con días.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Morning es una parte del día; Friday es un día.

activities.prompt: Friday / see / you / at / five / on
activities.correct_answer: See you on Friday at five.
activities.feedback_correct: On acompaña al día y at a la hora.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Coloca See you al inicio, después el día y finalmente la hora.

activities.instruction: Une cada mensaje con la acción necesaria.

pairs.left: I need to change the appointment.
I want to check the details.
pairs.right: Repeat and confirm the date and time.

activities.feedback_correct: Identificas qué decir ante problemas de calendario.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Piensa si necesitas preguntar, cambiar o confirmar.

activities.prompt: Your appointment is on Thursday, November 21st, at quarter past two in the afternoon. Please arrive ten minutes early.
activities.question: What time should you arrive?
activities.feedback_correct: Diez minutos antes de 2:15 es 2:05.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Resta diez minutos a quarter past two.

activities.prompt: My appointment is on Thursday, November twenty-first, at quarter past two. I will arrive at two o'clock.
activities.feedback_correct: Confirmas fecha y hora con precisión.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica el ordinal y separa la fecha de la hora con una pausa breve.

activities.prompt: Monday, May 6th: dentist at 9:00. Wednesday, May 8th: English test at half past six. Saturday, May 11th: family lunch at one.
activities.question: When is the English test?
activities.feedback_correct: Half past six es 6:30 el miércoles.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la línea de Wednesday y convierte half past six.

activities.prompt: Create a weekly calendar with eight commitments. Write the day/date, time, activity, and two free periods. Add a confirmation message for one event.

activities.instruction: Gestiona una agenda con la IA.
activities.prompt: You are an assistant managing a busy calendar. Schedule three appointments, handle a conflict, reschedule one event, and confirm every final detail.
activities.feedback_correct: Puedes gestionar compromisos y confirmar detalles con precisión.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA usa un calendario visual y repite únicamente la información que necesites reforzar.
